narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: इसी वजह से स्थिति सुधरने के बजाय और ज्यादा बिगड़ती जा रही है.
narratives.reasoning: This quote implies that the worsening situation is due to Ukraine's refusal of Russia's 'neutral country' proposal, shifting blame for the continuation of the conflict away from Russia's invasion and onto Ukraine's diplomatic stance.

narratives.evidence_quote: जर्मनी अभी भी रूस के खिलाफ कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाने से बच रहा है. उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है. उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: This statement criticizes Germany (a key Western nation) for prioritizing its own economy over taking strong action against Russia, portraying its diplomatic and economic stance as self-interested and weak.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narratives.evidence_quote: उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: This directly highlights a predicted adverse economic outcome (significant economic loss) for Germany, a Western country, as a consequence of imposing sanctions on Russia.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: Ukraine is the aggressor
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की तरफ से न्यूट्रल देश वाला प्रस्ताव जरूर रखा गया है, लेकिन यूक्रेन ने इसे मानने से साफ मना कर दिया है. इसी वजह से स्थिति सुधरने के बजाय और ज्यादा बिगड़ती जा रही है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly shifts blame for the continuation and worsening of the situation onto Ukraine by stating that Ukraine's refusal of Russia's 'neutral country' proposal is the reason the situation is deteriorating, implying Ukraine is obstructing peace rather than Russia being the aggressor.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: The West are the aggressors
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के राष्ट्रपति वोलोदिमिर जेलेंस्की इस समय पूरी दुनिया को रूस के खिलाफ एकजुट करने का प्रयास कर रहे हैं.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Zelenskyy's diplomatic efforts not as a defense against invasion, but as an active campaign to unite the world *against* Russia, portraying the West's potential unity as an aggressive act instigated by Ukraine, rather than a response to Russian aggression.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The EU is divided
subnarratives.evidence_quote: जेलेंस्की ने इस बात पर गुस्सा भी जाहिर किया कि जर्मनी अभी भी रूस के खिलाफ कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाने से बच रहा है. उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote highlights Germany's hesitation to impose strong sanctions due to its own economic concerns, portraying the EU not as a unified bloc but as a collection of self-interested, divided entities unable to take decisive collective action against Russia.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: The West does not care about Ukraine, only about its interests
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है. उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement frames Germany's (and by extension, the West's) primary concern as its own economic well-being, suggesting its support for Ukraine is conditional and secondary to its national interests, thereby discrediting the notion of altruistic Western support.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: बातचीत से कोई रास्ता नहीं निकला है और कीव को लेकर आर-पार की जंग देखने को मिल रही है.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that talks/diplomacy have yielded no solution ('कोई रास्ता नहीं निकला है') and that an all-out war is ongoing, which discredits the effectiveness and potential of diplomatic efforts to resolve the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Sanctions imposed by Western countries will backfire
subnarratives.evidence_quote: उसे डर लग रहा है कि रूस पर प्रतिबंध लगाने से जर्मनी को बड़ा आर्थिक नुकसान हो जाएगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly states that Germany fears significant economic damage from imposing sanctions on Russia, which aligns with the subnarrative that Western sanctions will have negative, backfiring consequences.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: जर्मनी अभी भी रूस के खिलाफ कड़े प्रतिबंध लगाने से बच रहा है। उसे अपने देश की अर्थव्यवस्था की ज्यादा चिंता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement supports the parent narrative by highlighting Germany's hesitation to impose strict sanctions due to economic concerns, which implies negative consequences for the West (Germany specifically). It is distinct from the 'sanctions backfire' quote as it frames the hesitation as a current state driven by self-interest, adding another layer to the narrative of Western vulnerability.
